arts.ttl: Galatasaray 23-24 100th Anniversary of Turkish Republic Kit Leaked
arts.sum: In October 2023, Galarasay introduced a special jersey to celebrate the 100th anniversary of the Turkish Republic.

arts.ttl: Preview: Galatasaray vs. Konyaspor - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Turkish Super Lig clash between Galatasaray and Konyaspor, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
